title: Cuneiform Tablet #0545: Achaemenid Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
